general.name_hint: The name shown to agents when you chat. Agents can use it to address you personally.

about.description: AI agent orchestration platform built on a Rust kernel with MCP-based plugin architecture.
about.restart_hint: Restart the application to use the new version.
about.auto_update_desc: Automatically check for new versions when the app starts.
about.setup_desc: Re-run the initial setup wizard to change language, theme, and display name.

advanced.yolo_warning: MCP server connection permissions are auto-approved without manual review. Tool execution still requires approval. SafetyGate and code validation remain active.
advanced.yolo_desc: When enabled, MCP server connection permission requests are automatically approved. Tool execution approval is unaffected. SafetyGate post-validation remains active as a safety net.
advanced.cron_limit_desc: Maximum generations a CRON job can recursively create child CRON jobs. 0 disables recursion entirely.

llm_providers.title: LLM Providers
llm_providers.desc: API keys are held by the kernel and never exposed to MCP servers (MGP §13.4).
llm_providers.model_dropdown_error: Could not load model list ({{code}}). Enter manually.
llm_providers.model_validation_empty: Model ID must not be empty
llm_providers.model_validation_too_long: Model ID must be 200 characters or fewer

security.invalidate_confirm_desc: This will revoke the key for all clients.

display.cursor_desc: Replaces the native cursor with an animated trail effect using canvas rendering.

log.title: Event Log
log.awaiting_signal: Coming soon — structured event log viewer is planned for a future release.
